# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:1.20-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY . .

RUN go mod download

RUN go build -o microservice

FROM alpine:3.18

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /app/microservice .

EXPOSE 8080

USER nobody

CMD ["./microservice"]
